title: Cannot automatically connect bit based port to real
body:
Compilation of the following SystemVerilog module throws an error:
```SystemVerilog
module a( input triand logic a1 );
endmodule: a

module b( input shortreal b1 );
  a ex(.a1(b1));
endmodule: b
```

Command:
```
iverilog -g2012 test.sv
```

Error output:
```
error: Cannot automatically connect bit based inout port 1 (a1) of module a to real signal b1.
```

Expected behavior:
Again, it seems real support is not that important, but there is is allowed by standart

This issue occurs in `Icarus Verilog version 13.0 (devel) (s20250103-66-gd67d3323a)`

Found by a [verilog model](https://github.com/DepTyCheck/verilog-model) using [deptycheck](https://github.com/buzden/deptycheck)
code_blocks: error: Cannot automatically connect bit based inout port 1 (a1) of module a to real signal b1.
